svg.text: Minami province, Fox Clan lands - seat of County Magistrate Kitsune Tatsuya
Walled two-courtyard compound · main gate south

g.text: Fox-Fire Lantern brought to the dais at evening
~15 useful samurai in the county town, the full
working platoon; cooks, grooms, servants in the
kitchen wing and stables; clerks commute from town.
